channel.title: dmytro.my — blog (en)
channel.description: Notes on building AI SaaS — agents, llm tradeoffs, product loops, infra.

item.title: How an AI Agent Configured AWS, a Domain, SSL, and CDN in 10 Minutes
item.description: Deploy a project to AWS in 10 minutes with AI agents. Ready-to-use DevOps prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and GLM.

item.title: Hermes Agent: A Personal AI Agent That Learns
item.description: How Hermes Agent uses persistent memory, self-improving skills, flexible execution backends, and messaging channels.

item.title: OpenClaw: A Personal AI Assistant Across Devices
item.description: How OpenClaw connects agents, memory, skills, automation, devices, and messaging platforms through one Gateway.
